scope: simulated transformer-style inference workload profiles; not real LLM serving or hardware benchmarking

profiles.name: prefill_heavy
profiles.description: Large prompt/batch-style phase with higher parallel compute and memory demand.

profiles.name: decode_heavy
profiles.description: Stepwise token-generation phase with sequential dependency pressure and latency sensitivity.

profiles.name: mixed_serving_trace
profiles.description: Prefill burst followed by repeated decode-style steps.

profiles.name: queue_pressure_serving_trace
profiles.description: Concurrent request pattern that increases queue buildup and scheduling delay.
